fonts.name: Playfair Display
fonts.usage: H1, H2, Hero displays (Editorial, premium vibe, organic feel)

fonts.name: Plus Jakarta Sans
fonts.usage: UI elements, body text, buttons, dashboards (Clean, modern legibility)

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Mobile-first, photography-led. Generous breathing room for images. Asymmetrical bento grids for discovery. High-contrast text over warm backgrounds.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-2xl for main cards, rounded-full for buttons and pills

grid_modes.marketing: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8 with overlapping image placements

component_guidelines.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full), primary uses solid #984A23, hover states slightly darken with slight transform translate-y-px.
component_guidelines.cards: Cardless or subtle 1px border (#E2D9CF) with very soft shadow (shadow-sm). For images, use absolute positioning with gradient overlays (bg-gradient-to-t from-black/60 to-transparent) to ensure text contrast.
component_guidelines.navigation: Sticky top, Crystal Glass effect: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FAF9F6]/70, 1px bottom border border-[#E2D9CF]. Nav links must be highly visible.
component_guidelines.inputs: Shadcn based, h-12 (touch friendly for mobile users), subtle background #F3EFEA, focus ring 2px #984A23.
component_guidelines.tabs: Pill-based tab list rather than underline, allowing easy horizontal scrolling on mobile.
component_guidelines.modals: Bottom drawers for mobile (booking flow), centered dialogs for desktop.

page_by_page_direction.landing_page: Hero: Large split screen or overlapping bento. Left: Value prop with Playfair Display. Right: Dynamic collage of faces/styles. Search bar (Style + City) prominent in hero. Categories: Asymmetrical grid with large imagery celebrating diverse beauty.
page_by_page_direction.discovery_page: Filter pills horizontally scrollable at top. Grid of practitioner cards (large image, 1:1 or 4:5 ratio). Clean typography, star rating in gold/amber. Image carousels inside the cards for mobile swiping.
page_by_page_direction.practitioner_profile: Instagram-style header. Massive profile image or gallery. Service menu as an accordion or list with clear 'Book' buttons. Reviews section featuring photo thumbnails.
page_by_page_direction.booking_flow: Step-by-step mobile-optimized wizard. Step 1: Service selection. Step 2: Calendar (Shadcn DatePicker inline). Step 3: Notes & Summary (Price breakdown, Deposit vs Remaining). Step 4: Mock payment.
page_by_page_direction.dashboards: Strict, clean utility. Sidebar navigation on desktop, bottom bar on mobile. Metric cards with subtle green trends. Table list for upcoming bookings.

hero_portrait.description: Woman with green and white flower on ear, elegant profile

category_braids.description: Woman wearing multicolored blouse and intricate braided hair

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Images scale up slightly (scale-105) on hover with a slow ease-out transition. Buttons translate-y-[-2px] with increased shadow.
motion_and_interaction.page_transitions: Fade in and slight slide up (framer-motion opacity: 0, y: 10).
motion_and_interaction.scrolling: Lenis smooth scrolling for marketing pages. Sticky headers.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST have data-testid attributes (kebab-case, role-based).

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard HTML + Tailwind for marketing layouts. Avoid Shadcn Cards on landing pages to maintain organic asymmetry.
Use Shadcn components heavily for the dashboards and booking flows, but override borders/radii to match the rounded-2xl organic feel.
For all images, use the provided Unsplash URLs.
For the practitioner portfolio grid, ensure images are object-cover and have consistent aspect ratios (e.g., aspect-[4/5] or aspect-square).
